Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George Sullivan, via Zoom, in propria persona, Personal Representative.

Mr. Sullivan reports on the difficulties in obtaining information to finalize and file the Final Inventory and Appraisal and requests a continuance of 90 days.

The Status on Filing of an Inventory and Appraisal is continued to Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Continued To Aug-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to in propria persona Personal Representative George Sullivan on Aug-01-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed pursuant to California probate code 8800. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George R. Sullivan, in court, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court asks if anyone is appearing to object to the petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-14-2019 is admitted to probate. George R. Sullivan is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on filing of an Inventory and Appraisal is set for Jul-11-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-13-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Continued To Feb-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
